title: Spotify Overlay
description:
A mod that can display any music you are playing on your PC from any App without premium or authentication!
Works on: Windows, MacOS and Linux!
body:
A in-game overlay that can display **all** current playing media on your PC. From **ANY** source that provides their media to the OS level media API.

This mod does not require you to authenticate yourself with any service or have a premium subscription for anything. IT JUST WORKS!

Massive thanks to [@Lazar Lominski](https://github.com/llominski) for helping with the OS level API library! ❤️

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iRsArBuW/images/9573717a8aa48d699c684ef31b64bde1314ff7f8.png)
